metadata.title: Singapore — the hedge-state financial hub: GIC/Temasek, MAS crypto, PSA transshipment, the S$3B laundering bust, and Chinese wealth inflows (both sides, dated)
metadata.status: the sovereign funds, MAS crypto regime, PSA port, the 2023 money-laundering case, and the US-security/China-economy hedge are FACT (MAS/govt/court records, news of record); the 'clean hub vs laundromat for Asian capital flight' tension is presented both ways
metadata.frame: Regional block: Singapore as the archetypal HEDGE-STATE — a US security partner AND a China economic node, and Asia's premier wealth/financial hub. Threads: the two sovereign funds (GIC ~$770B est., Temasek ~$300B+), MAS's crypto licensing (tightened after FTX/3AC/Terra all had Singapore links), PSA (world's busiest transshipment port), the booming family-office/private-banking hub drawing Chinese capital flight — and the S$3B money-laundering bust (2023) that exposed the AML underbelly. Attaches to GIC, Temasek, MAS, China, US_Government.

the_funds: Two state investors: GIC (the sovereign wealth fund managing the reserves, est. ~$770B AUM) and Temasek (the state holding company, ~$300B+ portfolio; it took a ~$275M writedown on FTX in 2022). Together they make the city-state a top-tier global allocator. grade: fact.
the_crypto: MAS (the central bank/regulator) built a courted-then-tightened crypto regime: Singapore attracted crypto firms, but the 2022 blowups all had Singapore links (Three Arrows Capital was Singapore-based; Terraform/Do Kwon had ties; FTX touched Temasek) — after which MAS tightened licensing + retail curbs (2023-25) and pushed firms offshore. grade: fact.
the_port_and_wealth: PSA runs the world's busiest TRANSSHIPMENT port (a chokepoint of global trade). Singapore is also Asia's wealth-management hub — a surge of single-family offices + private banking, heavily fed by CHINESE capital flight / de-risking. grade: fact.
the_laundering: The underbelly: in Aug 2023 Singapore busted a ~S$3B (~$2.2B) money-laundering ring — 10 Fujian-origin individuals (foreign passports), with cash/property/crypto/luxury seized — one of the world's largest, exposing AML gaps in the private-banking/family-office boom. Both sides: (A) Singapore's enforcement caught it + tightened rules; (B) the scale showed how much illicit Asian capital the hub had absorbed. grade: fact.
the_hedge: The strategic posture: Singapore hosts US military rotations/logistics AND is deeply integrated with China's economy + a RMB/wealth node — the textbook hedge (cross-link the #144 multi-alignment theme). grade: fact (the dual ties).
the_honest_reading: Singapore is the hedge-state financial hub: world-class sovereign funds (GIC/Temasek) + transshipment (PSA) + a wealth/crypto center that courted then disciplined crypto (FTX/3AC/Terra links) and absorbed Chinese capital flight — until the 2023 S$3B laundering bust exposed the AML cost. The clean-hub-vs-laundromat tension is presented both ways; the US-security/China-economy hedge is the structural point. Overlay; excluded from the proofs.

sources.name: Reuters — Temasek writes down $275M FTX stake (2022)

central bank/regulator; crypto licensing tightened after FTX/3AC/Terra Singapore links
largest SE-Asia bank; wealth-management hub (Chinese inflows)

US military rotations/logistics partner — the security half of the hedge
